title: ME6 5JX, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/DP3498HP/V005 and EPR/DP3498HP/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited Installation name: Ham Hill Wastewater Treatment Works & Sludge Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/DP3498HP  "
